pageContext.name: Taz
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Taz! Based on the likeness of the classic Looney Tune the Tasmanian Devil in Space Jam: A New Legacy, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   Space Jam fans, don't miss your chance to add Taz to your collection!
